response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust expertise in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about readiness for the core C++-centric routing tiling responsibilities.
strengths: Built and maintained a production-grade open-source GIS platform (GISCollective) with real-world use by NGOs.
Demonstrated deep systems-level experience with DLang, asynchronous I/O, and low-latency services.
Strong track record of self-directed learning, teaching, and contributing to developer tooling and testing infrastructure.
concerns: No explicit experience with C++ or Rust in commercial routing, navigation, or geospatial tile processing systems.
Recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent tooling, not core routing pipeline engineering.
Lacks demonstrated experience with distributed systems concepts (consistency, service discovery) in geospatial data contexts.

key_factors.factor: Language shift from systems to web
